raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed an unauthorized charge of {$290.00} on my account. A Citibank representative confirmed that this charge has been sent to the dispute department. However, my account balance has not been properly adjusted, and the disputed amount is still being included in my total balance. 

My most recent statement shows a balance of approximately {$440.00}, which includes the {$290.00} disputed charge, along with fees and interest. Citibank continues to request payment of {$440.00}, asked a minimum payment of {$63.00}, even though part of this balance is under dispute. 

I have made multiple attempts to resolve this issue : I have called Citibank several times, but calls were disconnected or I was unable to reach a representative I have sent XXXX written dispute letters by certified mail I recently mailed another letter to the dispute department Despite these efforts : The disputed amount has not been removed or clearly separated from my balance I continue to receive collection calls and emails demanding payment Interest and fees appear to be applied to the disputed amount This situation has caused significant stress, including difficulty sleeping, due to repeated collection calls and lack of resolution.
